goal: Deploy a polished internal case study to outboundautonomy.com/case-studies that 91 prospects will see when they click through from outreach emails, converting site visits into credibility.
success_criteria: outboundautonomy.com/case-studies returns 200 with a complete audit-led case study including scores, fixes, and CTA
Case study is clearly labeled 'Illustrative Composite' and links to /try for audit requests

slices.task: Write a concrete internal case study using the template at /Users/ryleebenson/Desktop/OPENCLAW/workspaces/creative/artifacts/site-copy/case-study-template-2026-04-28.md. Choose a composite SMB (roofing company with broken contact form, no mobile optimization, missing schema, 5-second load time). Structure: Problem (leaking leads) → Audit Scores (Design 45, Conversion 28, Technical 52 — clearly labeled 'illustrative composite') → What We Fixed (contact form rebuild, mobile responsive, schema markup, image optimization) → Results (load time 1.2s, mobile score 92, form completions +340% — labeled 'projected') → CTA ('Get your free audit at our site'). The case study must feel real enough to convince a prospect but be clearly labeled as illustrative. Write to artifacts/missions/icebreaker-case-study-live-20260429-0805/muse-case-study.md.

Read muse-case-study.md. Deploy it to the live /case-studies page: (1) Read the current page source at /Users/ryleebenson/Desktop/OPENCLAW/projects/outboundautonomy/app/case-studies/page.tsx, (2) Replace the content with the new case study, preserving the page wrapper/layout, (3) git add + git commit + git push from /Users/ryleebenson/Desktop/OPENCLAW/projects/outboundautonomy/, (4) Run vercel --prod to deploy. After deploy, curl https://outboundautonomy.com/case-studies and confirm 200 with new content. Write results with commit hash and HTTP status to artifacts/missions/icebreaker-case-study-live-20260429-0805/forge-deploy.md.

Read muse-case-study.md and forge-deploy.md. Verify: (a) the case study contains the 'Illustrative Composite' disclaimer, (b) curl https://outboundautonomy.com/case-studies and grep for key content from the new study to confirm deployment, (c) verify the page includes an audit-funnel CTA linking to /try or /sample-report. Write verdict to artifacts/missions/icebreaker-case-study-live-20260429-0805/sentinel-verify.md. Append SCORE_EVENT to _shared/scoring/history.jsonl for creative and engineering.

reasoning: 91 provider_accepted sends. Prospects ARE clicking through. The /case-studies page is what they'll see when evaluating credibility. Right now it's a generic composite that doesn't showcase OA's specific audit→fix→results methodology. This mission produces a concrete, shippable artifact that directly converts outreach traffic into trust. Not another research or send mission — a visible site improvement that 91 prospects are inbound to see. YELLOW for Vercel production deploy.
